parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets voltage-coded clock and bit decision threshold
parameters.valid_range: finite real within the intended clock logic range

parameters.name: tedge
parameters.override_behavior: sets residue and bit-output transition smoothing

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic rising-edge sampled two-stage quarter-scale conversion.
Use rail-referenced smoothed voltage outputs for residues and bits.
Do not hard-code validation points or use current contributions, transistor-level devices, AC/noise analysis, ddt, idt, or validation side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: On each rising CLK crossing, the converter samples VIN and updates all stage residues and bits; outputs hold between conversions.
Stage 1 clips VIN to vrefn through vrefp, selects the correct quarter-scale bin, and exposes the two-bit coarse decision on S1B1/S1B0.
RES1 is four times the clipped sampled-input error from the selected stage-1 bin center, clipped to the conversion range.
Stage 2 applies the same quarter-scale two-bit decision to RES1 and exposes it on S2B1/S2B0.
RES2 is four times the stage-2 input error from its selected bin center, clipped to the conversion range.
DOUT3/DOUT2 equal the stage-1 bits and DOUT1/DOUT0 equal the stage-2 bits, using VDD for high and VSS for low.

title: Pipeline ADC Chain 4b
